name: Unimplemented or Unsupported Feature in UI
description: A UI function for a security feature appears to be supported and gives feedback suggesting it is active, but the underlying functionality is not actually implemented. Users believe a security control is protecting them when no such protection exists.
detection_pattern: EGRESS node (UI element) presents a security feature toggle or indicator, but no corresponding CONTROL or AUTH node exists in the backend to enforce the feature. The STRUCTURAL UI component references a security capability that has no implementation path in the graph.
